现在实现 1.1：更新 db.ts 添加 content/commit_layer 字段、schema 迁移、分层搜索：

Tool Call #533 Write tooluse_1v7oYAnQyaDMVs8iMmQFTA 14:11:23
Write input={"content":"/**\n * Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog.\n *\n * Uses better-sqlite3 (native binding) for synchronous SQLite access.\n * FT...
Show input payload 
{
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\transcript\\db.ts",
  "content": "/**\n * Transcript search index — SQLite upsert for the global transcript catalog.\n *\n * Uses better-sqlite3 (native binding) for synchronous SQLite access.\n * FTS4 full-text search on title, cwd, branch, content, commit_layer columns.\n *\n * Design notes:\n * - Schema init uses ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN for additive migrations (no version table).\n * - FTS table is dropped+recreated when column list changes.\n * - busy_timeout = 5000ms guards against concurrent writer collisions.\n * - Single-quotes are stripped from FTS queries to prevent MATCH parse errors.\n * - searchTranscripts opens readonly and never writes.\n */\n\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3'\nimport { mkdirSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { dirname } from 'node:path'\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '@openmnemo/types'\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Column definitions\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nconst PK_COLUMNS = [\n  'client',\n  'project',\n  'session_id',\n  'raw_sha256',\n] as const\n\nconst DATA_COLUMNS = [\n  'title',\n  'started_at',\n  'imported_at',\n  'cwd',\n  'branch',\n  'raw_source_path',\n  'raw_upload_permission',\n  'global_raw_path',\n  'global_clean_path',\n  'repo_raw_path',\n  'repo_clean_path',\n  'repo_manifest_path',\n  'message_count',\n  'tool_event_count',\n  'content',\n  'commit_layer',\n] as const\n\nconst ALL_COLUMNS = [...PK_COLUMNS, ...DATA_COLUMNS] as const\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// SQL statements\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nconst CREATE_TABLE_SQL = `\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (\n    client              TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    project             TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    session_id          TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    raw_sha256          TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    title               TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    started_at          TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    imported_at         TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    cwd                 TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    branch              TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    raw_source_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    raw_upload_permission TEXT  NOT NULL,\n    global_raw_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    global_clean_path   TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    repo_raw_path       TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    repo_clean_path     TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    repo_manifest_path  TEXT    NOT NULL,\n    message_count       INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    tool_event_count    INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    content             TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n    commit_layer        TEXT    NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n    PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)\n  )\n`\n\nconst UPSERT_SQL = `\n  INSERT INTO transcripts (\n    ${ALL_COLUMNS.join(', ')}\n  ) VALUES (${ALL_COLUMNS.map(() => '?').join(', ')})\n  ON CONFLICT(${PK_COLUMNS.join(', ')}) DO UPDATE SET\n    ${DATA_COLUMNS.map((c) => `${c} = excluded.${c}`).join(',\\n    ')}\n`\n\nconst CREATE_FTS_SQL = `\n  CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts_fts USING fts4(\n    content='transcripts',\n    title, cwd, branch, content, commit_layer\n  )\n`\n\nconst REBUILD_FTS_SQL = `\n  INSERT INTO transcripts_fts(transcripts_fts) VALUES('rebuild')\n`\n\nconst SEARCH_SQL = `\n  SELECT t.client, t.project, t.session_id, t.title, t.cwd, t.branch, t.started_at\n  FROM transcripts_fts\n  JOIN transcripts t ON transcripts_fts.docid = t.rowid\n  WHERE transcripts_fts MATCH ?\n  ORDER BY t.started_at DESC\n  LIMIT ?\n`\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Types\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface SearchResult {\n  client: string\n  project: string\n  session_id: string\n  title: string\n  cwd: string\n  branch: string\n  started_at: string\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Helpers\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Sanitize a user-supplied query string for safe use in an FTS4 MATCH clause.\n * Strips all non-letter/digit/space characters (including single quotes which\n * cause FTS4 MATCH parse errors).\n */\nexport function sanitizeFtsQuery(raw: string): string {\n  return raw\n    .replace(/[^\\p{L}\\p{N}\\s]/gu, ' ')\n    .trim()\n    .replace(/\\s+/g, ' ')\n}\n\n/**\n * Open (or create) a writable SQLite database.\n * Runs schema migration on every open.\n */\nfunction openDb(dbPath: string): InstanceType<typeof Database> {\n  mkdirSync(dirname(dbPath), { recursive: true })\n  const db = new Database(dbPath)\n  db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL')\n  db.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000')\n  return db\n}\n\n/**\n * Additive column migration — adds content and commit_layer if missing.\n * Ignores \"duplicate column name\" errors (idempotent).\n */\nfunction migrateSchema(db: InstanceType<typeof Database>): void {\n  for (const col of ['content', 'commit_layer']) {\n    try {\n      db.exec(`ALTER TABLE transcripts ADD COLUMN ${col} TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`)\n    } catch (e: unknown) {\n      if (!(e instanceof Error) || !e.message.includes('duplicate column name')) throw e\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Drop and recreate FTS table if it doesn't have the new columns.\n * Must be called after migrateSchema so the source table is up to date.\n */\nfunction migrateFts(db: InstanceType<typeof Database>): void {\n  const row = db.prepare(\n    \"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='transcripts_fts'\"\n  ).get() as { sql: string } | undefined\n\n  if (!row || !row.sql.includes('commit_layer')) {\n    db.exec('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS transcripts_fts')\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Public API\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\n/**\n * Initialise schema (transcripts table + FTS virtual table).\n * Safe to call multiple times — uses IF NOT EXISTS + additive migration.\n */\nexport function initSchema(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Rebuild the FTS index from the transcripts table.\n * Call once after a batch of upserts, or after any DELETE/VACUUM.\n */\nexport function rebuildFtsIndex(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Full-text search over the transcript index using FTS4.\n * Opens readonly — never writes. Returns [] when db missing or query empty.\n */\nexport function searchTranscripts(\n  dbPath: string,\n  query: string,\n  limit = 20,\n): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(sanitized, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Search restricted to specific FTS columns using FTS4 column filter syntax.\n * e.g. columns=['commit_layer'] → MATCH 'commit_layer:term'\n */\nexport function searchTranscriptsByColumns(\n  dbPath: string,\n  query: string,\n  columns: string[],\n  limit = 20,\n): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized || columns.length === 0) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n\n  const columnQuery = columns.map((col) => `${col}:${sanitized}`).join(' OR ')\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(columnQuery, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}\n\n/**\n * Insert or update a single transcript manifest row.\n * Creates schema if needed. Rebuilds FTS after write.\n */\nexport function upsertSearchIndex(\n  dbPath: string,\n  manifest: ManifestEntry,\n): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n\n    const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }\n    const params: (string | number)[] = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {\n      const value = record[col]\n      if (value === undefined || value === null) return ''\n      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)\n    })\n\n    db.prepare(UPSERT_SQL).run(params)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}\n"
}

Read output=1→/** 2→ * Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management. 3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py 4→ */ 5→ 6→import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSy...
Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Transcript import — orchestration, cleaning, and manifest management.
     3→ * Port of scripts/_transcript_import.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { copyFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, appendFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { dirname, extname, join, relative } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→import type { ManifestEntry, ParsedTranscript } from '@openmnemo/types'
    10→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    11→import {
    12→  loadJson,
    13→  normalizeTimestamp,
    14→  sha256File,
    15→  slugify,
    16→  timestampPartition,
    17→  yamlEscape,
    18→} from './common.js'
    19→import { upsertSearchIndex } from './db.js'
    20→
    21→export async function importTranscript(
    22→  parsed: ParsedTranscript,
    23→  root: string,
    24→  globalRoot: string,
    25→  projectSlug: string,
    26→  rawUploadPermission: string,
    27→  mirrorToRepo = true,
    28→): Promise<ManifestEntry> {
    29→  const importedAt = normalizeTimestamp(new Date())
    30→  const rawSha256 = sha256File(parsed.source_path)
    31→  const sessionLabel = slugify(
    32→    parsed.session_id,
    33→    slugify(stemOf(parsed.source_path), 'session'),
    34→  )
    35→  const artifactStem = `${sessionLabel}__${rawSha256.slice(0, 8)}`
    36→  const sourceSuffix = extname(parsed.source_path) || '.txt'
    37→
    38→  const [yearToken, monthToken] = timestampPartition(parsed.started_at || importedAt)
    39→
    40→  const repoRoot = join(root, 'Memory', '06_transcripts')
    41→  const repoRawPath = join(repoRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    42→  const repoCleanPath = join(repoRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    43→  const repoManifestPath = join(repoRoot, 'manifests', parsed.client, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    44→
    45→  const globalRawPath = join(globalRoot, 'raw', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}${sourceSuffix}`)
    46→  const globalCleanPath = join(globalRoot, 'clean', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.md`)
    47→  const globalManifestPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'manifests', parsed.client, projectSlug, yearToken, monthToken, `${artifactStem}.json`)
    48→  const globalEventLogPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
    49→  const globalDbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
    50→
    51→  for (const p of [globalRawPath, globalCleanPath, globalManifestPath, globalEventLogPath, globalDbPath]) {
    52→    mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    53→  }
    54→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    55→    for (const p of [repoRawPath, repoCleanPath, repoManifestPath]) {
    56→      mkdirSync(dirname(p), { recursive: true })
    57→    }
    58→  }
    59→
    60→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    61→    copyFile(parsed.source_path, repoRawPath)
    62→  }
    63→  copyFile(parsed.source_path, globalRawPath)
    64→
    65→  let manifest: ManifestEntry = {
    66→    client: parsed.client,
    67→    project: projectSlug,
    68→    session_id: parsed.session_id,
    69→    title: parsed.title,
    70→    started_at: parsed.started_at,
    71→    imported_at: importedAt,
    72→    cwd: parsed.cwd,
    73→    branch: parsed.branch,
    74→    raw_source_path: toPosixPath(parsed.source_path),
    75→    raw_sha256: rawSha256,
    76→    raw_upload_permission: rawUploadPermission,
    77→    repo_raw_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoRawPath)) : '',
    78→    repo_clean_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoCleanPath)) : '',
    79→    repo_manifest_path: mirrorToRepo ? toPosixPath(relative(root, repoManifestPath)) : '',
    80→    global_raw_path: toPosixPath(globalRawPath),
    81→    global_clean_path: toPosixPath(globalCleanPath),
    82→    global_manifest_path: toPosixPath(globalManifestPath),
    83→    message_count: parsed.messages.length,
    84→    tool_event_count: parsed.tool_events.length,
    85→    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',
    86→    repo_mirror_enabled: mirrorToRepo,
    87→  }
    88→
    89→  const existingGlobalManifest = loadJson(globalManifestPath)
    90→  manifest = preserveExistingImportTimestamp(existingGlobalManifest, manifest)
    91→
    92→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    93→    writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, repoCleanPath)
    94→  }
    95→  writeCleanMarkdown(parsed, manifest, globalCleanPath)
    96→  const manifestRecord = { ...manifest } as Record<string, unknown>
    97→  if (mirrorToRepo) {
    98→    writeJson(repoManifestPath, manifestRecord)
    99→  }
   100→  const appendToEventLog = existingGlobalManifest === null || !deepEqual(existingGlobalManifest, manifestRecord)
   101→  writeJson(globalManifestPath, manifestRecord)
   102→  if (appendToEventLog) {
   103→    appendJsonl(globalEventLogPath, manifestRecord)
   104→  }
   105→  try {
   106→    upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, manifest)
   107→  } catch {
   108→    // Non-fatal: search index failure should not abort the import
   109→  }
   110→
   111→  return manifest
   112→}
   113→
   114→export function transcriptHasContent(parsed: ParsedTranscript): boolean {
   115→  return parsed.messages.length > 0 || parsed.tool_events.length > 0
   116→}
   117→
   118→export function writeCleanMarkdown(parsed: ParsedTranscript, manifest: ManifestEntry, filePath: string): void {
   119→  const lines: string[] = [
   120→    '---',
   121→    `client: ${manifest.client}`,
   122→    `project: ${manifest.project}`,
   123→    `session_id: ${manifest.session_id}`,
   124→    `title: ${yamlEscape(manifest.title)}`,
   125→    `started_at: ${manifest.started_at}`,
   126→    `imported_at: ${manifest.imported_at}`,
   127→    `cwd: ${yamlEscape(manifest.cwd)}`,
   128→    `branch: ${yamlEscape(manifest.branch)}`,
   129→    `raw_source_path: ${yamlEscape(manifest.raw_source_path)}`,
   130→    `raw_sha256: ${manifest.raw_sha256}`,
   131→    `raw_upload_permission: ${manifest.raw_upload_permission}`,
   132→    `cleaning_mode: ${manifest.cleaning_mode}`,
   133→    '---',
   134→    '',
   135→    `# ${manifest.title || manifest.session_id}`,
   136→    '',
   137→    '## Metadata',
   138→    `- Client: \`${manifest.client}\``,
   139→    `- Project: \`${manifest.project}\``,
   140→    `- Session ID: \`${manifest.session_id}\``,
   141→    `- Started At: \`${manifest.started_at}\``,
   142→    `- Imported At: \`${manifest.imported_at}\``,
   143→    `- Raw SHA256: \`${manifest.raw_sha256}\``,
   144→    `- Raw Source: \`${manifest.raw_source_path}\``,
   145→    `- Repo Raw Path: \`${manifest.repo_raw_path}\``,
   146→    `- Repo Clean Path: \`${manifest.repo_clean_path}\``,
   147→    '',
   148→    '## Messages',
   149→  ]
   150→
   151→  if (parsed.messages.length > 0) {
   152→    for (let i = 0; i < parsed.messages.length; i++) {
   153→      const message = parsed.messages[i]!
   154→      lines.push(
   155→        `### ${i + 1}. ${message.role}`,
   156→        `- Timestamp: \`${message.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\``,
   157→        '',
   158→        message.text,
   159→        '',
   160→      )
   161→    }
   162→  } else {
   163→    lines.push(
   164→      'No user or assistant messages were extracted deterministically from the source transcript.',
   165→      '',
   166→    )
   167→  }
   168→
   169→  lines.push('## Tool Events')
   170→  if (parsed.tool_events.length > 0) {
   171→    for (const event of parsed.tool_events) {
   172→      lines.push(`- \`${event.timestamp ?? manifest.started_at}\` ${event.summary}`)
   173→    }
   174→  } else {
   175→    lines.push('- No tool events were extracted.')
   176→  }
   177→  lines.push('')
   178→
   179→  writeFileSync(filePath, lines.join('\n'), 'utf-8')
   180→}
   181→
   182→export function preserveExistingImportTimestamp(
   183→  existing: Record<string, unknown> | null,
   184→  payload: ManifestEntry,
   185→): ManifestEntry {
   186→  if (existing === null) return payload
   187→  const payloadRecord = { ...payload } as Record<string, unknown>
   188→  if (!deepEqual(manifestSignature(existing), manifestSignature(payloadRecord))) return payload
   189→  const importedAt = existing['imported_at']
   190→  if (typeof importedAt === 'string' && importedAt) {
   191→    return { ...payload, imported_at: importedAt }
   192→  }
   193→  return payload
   194→}
   195→
   196→export function manifestSignature(payload: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown> {
   197→  const result: Record<string, unknown> = {}
   198→  for (const [key, value] of Object.entries(payload)) {
   199→    if (key !== 'imported_at') {
   200→      result[key] = value
   201→    }
   202→  }
   203→  return result
   204→}
   205→
   206→export function manifestChanged(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): boolean {
   207→  if (!existsSync(filePath)) return true
   208→  try {
   209→    const current = JSON.parse(readFileSync(filePath, 'utf-8')) as Record<string, unknown>
   210→    return !deepEqual(current, payload)
   211→  } catch {
   212→    return true
   213→  }
   214→}
   215→
   216→export function writeJson(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   217→  writeFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload, null, 2) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   218→}
   219→
   220→export function appendJsonl(filePath: string, payload: Record<string, unknown>): void {
   221→  appendFileSync(filePath, JSON.stringify(payload) + '\n', 'utf-8')
   222→}
   223→
   224→export function copyFile(source: string, destination: string): void {
   225→  if (source === destination) return
   226→  copyFileSync(source, destination)
   227→}
   228→
   229→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   230→// Internal helpers
   231→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   232→
   233→function stemOf(filePath: string): string {
   234→  const base = filePath.replace(/\\/g, '/').split('/').pop() ?? ''
   235→  const ext = extname(base)
   236→  return ext ? base.slice(0, -ext.length) : base
   237→}
   238→
   239→function deepEqual(a: unknown, b: unknown): boolean {
   240→  if (a === b) return true
   241→  if (a === null || b === null || typeof a !== typeof b) return false
   242→  if (typeof a !== 'object') return false
   243→  if (Array.isArray(a) !== Array.isArray(b)) return false
   244→  const aObj = a as Record<string, unknown>
   245→  const bObj = b as Record<string, unknown>
   246→  const aKeys = Object.keys(aObj)
   247→  const bKeys = Object.keys(bObj)
   248→  if (aKeys.length !== bKeys.length) return false
   249→  return aKeys.every(key => deepEqual(aObj[key], bObj[key]))
   250→}
   251→

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Recall — on-demand transcript sync + latest session lookup.
     3→ * Port of scripts/recall-session.py
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { existsSync, readFileSync } from 'node:fs'
     7→import { resolve, join } from 'node:path'
     8→
     9→import Database from 'better-sqlite3'
    10→
    11→import { slugify } from '../transcript/common.js'
    12→import { defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot, discoverSourceFiles, transcriptMatchesRepo } from '../transcript/discover.js'
    13→import { importTranscript, transcriptHasContent } from '../transcript/import.js'
    14→import { parseTranscript } from '../transcript/parse.js'
    15→import { toPosixPath } from '../utils/path.js'
    16→
    17→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    18→// Types
    19→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    20→
    21→export interface RecallResult {
    22→  found: boolean
    23→  project: string
    24→  repo: string
    25→  imported_count: number
    26→  message?: string
    27→  client?: string
    28→  session_id?: string
    29→  title?: string
    30→  started_at?: string
    31→  cwd?: string
    32→  branch?: string
    33→  message_count?: number
    34→  tool_event_count?: number
    35→  global_clean_path?: string
    36→  clean_content?: string
    37→}
    38→
    39→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    40→// Public API
    41→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    42→
    43→export async function recall(
    44→  root: string,
    45→  projectName: string,
    46→  globalRootOverride: string,
    47→  activationTime: string,
    48→): Promise<RecallResult> {
    49→  const resolvedRoot = resolve(root)
    50→  const repoSlug = slugify(projectName.trim() || (resolvedRoot.split(/[/\\]/).pop() ?? ''), 'project')
    51→  const globalRoot = globalRootOverride ? resolve(globalRootOverride) : defaultGlobalTranscriptRoot()
    52→  const effectiveActivation = activationTime || nowIso()
    53→
    54→  const imported = await syncCurrentProject(resolvedRoot, repoSlug, globalRoot)
    55→
    56→  const session = findLatestSession(globalRoot, resolvedRoot, repoSlug, effectiveActivation)
    57→
    58→  if (session === null) {
    59→    return {
    60→      found: false,
    61→      project: repoSlug,
    62→      repo: toPosixPath(resolvedRoot),
    63→      imported_count: imported,
    64→      message: 'No previous session found for this project.',
    65→    }
    66→  }
    67→
    68→  const cleanPath = String(session['global_clean_path'] ?? '')
    69→  let cleanContent = ''
    70→  if (cleanPath && existsSync(cleanPath)) {
    71→    try {
    72→      cleanContent = readFileSync(cleanPath, 'utf-8')
    73→    } catch {
    74→      // ignore read errors
    75→    }
    76→  }
    77→
    78→  return {
    79→    found: true,
    80→    project: repoSlug,
    81→    repo: toPosixPath(resolvedRoot),
    82→    imported_count: imported,
    83→    client: String(session['client'] ?? ''),
    84→    session_id: String(session['session_id'] ?? ''),
    85→    title: String(session['title'] ?? ''),
    86→    started_at: String(session['started_at'] ?? ''),
    87→    cwd: String(session['cwd'] ?? ''),
    88→    branch: String(session['branch'] ?? ''),
    89→    message_count: Number(session['message_count'] ?? 0),
    90→    tool_event_count: Number(session['tool_event_count'] ?? 0),
    91→    global_clean_path: cleanPath,
    92→    clean_content: cleanContent,
    93→  }
    94→}
    95→
    96→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    97→// Sync current project
    98→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
    99→
   100→export async function syncCurrentProject(root: string, repoSlug: string, globalRoot: string): Promise<number> {
   101→  const discovered = discoverSourceFiles()
   102→  let imported = 0
   103→
   104→  for (const [client, source] of discovered) {
   105→    let parsed
   106→    try {
   107→      parsed = parseTranscript(client, source)
   108→    } catch {
   109→      continue
   110→    }
   111→
   112→    if (!transcriptHasContent(parsed)) continue
   113→    if (!transcriptMatchesRepo(parsed, root, repoSlug)) continue
   114→
   115→    try {
   116→      await importTranscript(parsed, root, globalRoot, repoSlug, 'not-set', true)
   117→      imported++
   118→    } catch {
   119→      continue
   120→    }
   121→  }
   122→
   123→  return imported
   124→}
   125→
   126→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   127→// Find latest session
   128→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   129→
   130→export function findLatestSession(
   131→  globalRoot: string,
   132→  root: string,
   133→  repoSlug: string,
   134→  activationTime: string,
   135→): Record<string, unknown> | null {
   136→  const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')
   137→  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) {
   138→    return findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime)
   139→  }
   140→
   141→  try {
   142→    const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })
   143→    try {
   144→      const rows = db
   145→        .prepare('SELECT * FROM transcripts WHERE started_at < ? ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 20')
   146→        .all(activationTime) as Record<string, unknown>[]
   147→
   148→      const resolvedRoot = toPosixPath(resolve(root)).toLowerCase()
   149→      for (const row of rows) {
   150→        const cwd = String(row['cwd'] ?? '')
   151→        const project = String(row['project'] ?? '')
   152→        if (cwdMatches(cwd, resolvedRoot) || project === repoSlug) {
   153→          return row
   154→        }
   155→      }
   156→    } finally {
   157→      db.close()
   158→    }
   159→  } catch {
   160→    return findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime)
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  // No matching row in DB — fall back to JSONL index
   164→  return findLatestFromJsonl(globalRoot, root, repoSlug, activationTime)
   165→}
   166→
   167→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   168→// JSONL fallback
   169→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   170→
   171→export function findLatestFromJsonl(
   172→  globalRoot: string,
   173→  root: string,
   174→  repoSlug: string,
   175→  activationTime: string,
   176→): Record<string, unknown> | null {
   177→  const jsonlPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'sessions.jsonl')
   178→  if (!existsSync(jsonlPath)) return null
   179→
   180→  const resolvedRoot = toPosixPath(resolve(root)).toLowerCase()
   181→  const candidates: Record<string, unknown>[] = []
   182→
   183→  let content: string
   184→  try {
   185→    content = readFileSync(jsonlPath, 'utf-8')
   186→  } catch {
   187→    return null
   188→  }
   189→
   190→  for (const line of content.split('\n')) {
   191→    const trimmed = line.trim()
   192→    if (!trimmed) continue
   193→    let entry: Record<string, unknown>
   194→    try {
   195→      entry = JSON.parse(trimmed) as Record<string, unknown>
   196→    } catch {
   197→      continue
   198→    }
   199→
   200→    const started = String(entry['started_at'] ?? '')
   201→    if (started >= activationTime) continue
   202→
   203→    const cwd = String(entry['cwd'] ?? '')
   204→    const project = String(entry['project'] ?? '')
   205→    if (cwdMatches(cwd, resolvedRoot) || project === repoSlug) {
   206→      candidates.push(entry)
   207→    }
   208→  }
   209→
   210→  if (candidates.length === 0) return null
   211→
   212→  candidates.sort((a, b) => {
   213→    const aTime = String(a['started_at'] ?? '')
   214→    const bTime = String(b['started_at'] ?? '')
   215→    return bTime.localeCompare(aTime)
   216→  })
   217→  return candidates[0]!
   218→}
   219→
   220→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   221→// CWD matching
   222→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   223→
   224→export function cwdMatches(cwd: string, resolvedRoot: string): boolean {
   225→  if (!cwd) return false
   226→  try {
   227→    const cwdResolved = toPosixPath(resolve(cwd)).toLowerCase()
   228→    if (cwdResolved === resolvedRoot) return true
   229→    const prefix = resolvedRoot.endsWith('/') ? resolvedRoot : resolvedRoot + '/'
   230→    return cwdResolved.startsWith(prefix)
   231→  } catch {
   232→    return false
   233→  }
   234→}
   235→
   236→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   237→// Helpers
   238→// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
   239→
   240→function nowIso(): string {
   241→  return new Date().toISOString().replace(/\.\d{3}Z$/, 'Z')
   242→}
   243→
   244→export function formatText(payload: RecallResult): string {
   245→  if (!payload.found) {
   246→    return [
   247→      `project: ${payload.project}`,
   248→      `imported: ${payload.imported_count}`,
   249→      `result: ${payload.message ?? 'No previous session found.'}`,
   250→    ].join('\n')
   251→  }
   252→
   253→  const lines = [
   254→    `project: ${payload.project}`,
   255→    `client: ${payload.client ?? ''}`,
   256→    `session_id: ${payload.session_id ?? ''}`,
   257→    `title: ${payload.title ?? ''}`,
   258→    `started_at: ${payload.started_at ?? ''}`,
   259→    `cwd: ${payload.cwd ?? ''}`,
   260→    `branch: ${payload.branch ?? ''}`,
   261→    `messages: ${payload.message_count ?? 0}`,
   262→    `tool_events: ${payload.tool_event_count ?? 0}`,
   263→    `imported_this_sync: ${payload.imported_count}`,
   264→    `clean_transcript: ${payload.global_clean_path ?? ''}`,
   265→  ]
   266→
   267→  if (payload.clean_content) {
   268→    lines.push('', '--- clean transcript content ---', payload.clean_content)
   269→  }
   270→
   271→  return lines.join('\n')
   272→}
   273→

Show input payload 
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\recall\\recall.ts",
  "old_string": "  return lines.join('\\n')\n}",
  "new_string": "  return lines.join('\\n')\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// Layered full-text search\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\nexport interface SearchRecallResult {\n  layer: 1 | 2 | 3\n  results: SearchResult[]\n}\n\n/**\n * Three-layer search over the transcript index:\n *   Layer 1 — commit_layer (git commit messages + changed files)\n *   Layer 2 — title, cwd, branch (metadata, existing FTS behaviour)\n *   Layer 3 — content (full clean markdown text)\n *\n * Returns results from the first layer that has matches.\n */\nexport function searchRecall(\n  globalRoot: string,\n  query: string,\n  limit = 20,\n): SearchRecallResult {\n  const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')\n\n  const layer1 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['commit_layer'], limit)\n  if (layer1.length > 0) return { layer: 1, results: layer1 }\n\n  const layer2 = searchTranscripts(dbPath, query, limit)\n  if (layer2.length > 0) return { layer: 2, results: layer2 }\n\n  const layer3 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['content'], limit)\n  return { layer: 3, results: layer3 }\n}"
}

'../../src/storage/factory.js'\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '@openmnemo/types'\n\nfunction makeManifest(overrides: Partial<ManifestEntry> = {}): ManifestEntry {\n  return {\n    client: 'claude',\n    project: 'my-project',\n    session_id: 'sess-001',\n    raw_sha256: 'abc123def456',\n    title: 'Test Session',\n    started_at: '2024-06-01T00:00:00Z',\n    imported_at: '2024-06-01T01:00:00Z',\n    cwd: '/home/user/project',\n    branch: 'main',\n    raw_source_path: '/raw/source.jsonl',\n    raw_upload_permission: 'granted',\n    global_raw_path: '/global/raw/file.jsonl',\n    global_clean_path: '/global/clean/file.md',\n    global_manifest_path: '/global/manifests/file.json',\n    repo_raw_path: '.memorytree/raw/file.jsonl',\n    repo_clean_path: '.memorytree/clean/file.md',\n    repo_manifest_path: '.memorytree/manifests/file.json',\n    message_count: 5,\n    tool_event_count: 2,\n    cleaning_mode: 'deterministic-code',\n    repo_mirror_enabled: true,\n    ...overrides,\n  }\n}\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// SqliteFtsAdapter\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('SqliteFtsAdapter', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n  let dbPath: string\n  let adapter: SqliteFtsAdapter\n\n  beforeEach(() => {\n    tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'fts-adapter-test-'))\n    dbPath = join(tmpDir, 'search.sqlite')\n    adapter = new SqliteFtsAdapter(dbPath)\n  })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('upsert + search round-trip finds the record', () => {\n    adapter.upsert(makeManifest({ title: 'authentication flow' }))\n    const results = adapter.search('authentication')\n    expect(results).toHaveLength(1)\n    expect(results[0]!.title).toBe('authentication flow')\n  })\n\n  it('search returns empty array when db does not exist', () => {\n    const missing = new SqliteFtsAdapter(join(tmpDir, 'nonexistent.sqlite'))\n    expect(missing.search('anything')).toEqual([])\n  })\n\n  it('search respects options.limit', () => {\n    for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {\n      adapter.upsert(makeManifest({ session_id: `sess-${i}`, title: `session number ${i}` }))\n    }\n    const results = adapter.search('session', { limit: 3 })\n    expect(results).toHaveLength(3)\n  })\n\n  it('close() does not throw', () => {\n    expect(() => adapter.close()).not.toThrow()\n  })\n\n  it('upsert is idempotent — same manifest twice = one row', () => {\n    const m = makeManifest({ title: 'idempotent test' })\n    adapter.upsert(m)\n    adapter.upsert(m)\n    expect(adapter.search('idempotent')).toHaveLength(1)\n  })\n})\n\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n// factory\n// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n\ndescribe('createSearchAdapter', () => {\n  let tmpDir: string\n\n  beforeEach(() => { tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'factory-test-')) })\n  afterEach(() => { rmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true }) })\n\n  it('returns a SqliteFtsAdapter instance', () => {\n    const adapter = createSearchAdapter({ indexDir: tmpDir })\n    expect(adapter).toBeInstanceOf(SqliteFtsAdapter)\n  })\n\n  it('returned adapter can upsert and search without throwing', () => {\n    const adapter = createSearchAdapter({ indexDir: tmpDir })\n    adapter.upsert(makeManifest({ title: 'factory search test' }))\n    expect(adapter.search('factory')).toHaveLength(1)\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe('createVectorAdapter', () => {\n  it('throws for sqlite-vec (Phase 1 not implemented)', () => {\n    expect(() => createVectorAdapter({ indexDir: '/tmp', vector_backend: 'sqlite-vec' }))\n      .toThrow('not implemented in Phase 1')\n  })\n\n  it('throws for qdrant (constructor throws Phase 1)', () => {\n    expect(() => createVectorAdapter({ indexDir: '/tmp', vector_backend: 'qdrant' }))\n      .toThrow('not implemented in Phase 1')\n  })\n})\n\ndescribe('createGraphAdapter', () => {\n  it('throws for sqlite (Phase 1 not implemented)', () => {\n    expect(() => createGraphAdapter({ indexDir: '/tmp', graph_backend: 'sqlite' }))\n      .toThrow('not implemented in Phase 1')\n  })\n\n  it('throws for neo4j (constructor throws Phase 1)', () => {\n    expect(() => createGraphAdapter({ indexDir: '/tmp', graph_backend: 'neo4j' }))\n      .toThrow('not implemented in Phase 1')\n  })\n})\n"
}

string\n  text: string\n  timestamp: string | null\n}\n\nexport interface TranscriptToolEvent {\n  summary: string\n  timestamp: string | null\n}\n\nexport interface ParsedTranscript {\n  client: Client\n  session_id: string\n  title: string\n  started_at: string\n  cwd: string\n  branch: string\n  messages: TranscriptMessage[]\n  tool_events: TranscriptToolEvent[]\n  source_path: string\n}\n\nexport interface ManifestEntry {\n  client: string\n  project: string\n  session_id: string\n  raw_sha256: string\n  title: string\n  started_at: string\n  imported_at: string\n  cwd: string\n  branch: string\n  raw_source_path: string\n  raw_upload_permission: string\n  global_raw_path: string\n  global_clean_path: string\n  global_manifest_path: string\n  repo_raw_path: string\n  repo_clean_path: string\n  repo_manifest_path: string\n  message_count: number\n  tool_event_count: number\n  cleaning_mode: string\n  repo_mirror_enabled: boolean\n  content?: string\n  commit_layer?: string\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts (full file)\n```ts\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3'\nimport { mkdirSync, existsSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { dirname } from 'node:path'\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '@openmnemo/types'\n\nconst PK_COLUMNS = ['client','project','session_id','raw_sha256'] as const\nconst DATA_COLUMNS = [\n  'title','started_at','imported_at','cwd','branch',\n  'raw_source_path','raw_upload_permission',\n  'global_raw_path','global_clean_path',\n  'repo_raw_path','repo_clean_path','repo_manifest_path',\n  'message_count','tool_event_count',\n  'content','commit_layer',\n] as const\nconst ALL_COLUMNS = [...PK_COLUMNS, ...DATA_COLUMNS] as const\n\nconst CREATE_TABLE_SQL = `\n  CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts (\n    client TEXT NOT NULL, project TEXT NOT NULL,\n    session_id TEXT NOT NULL, raw_sha256 TEXT NOT NULL,\n    title TEXT NOT NULL, started_at TEXT NOT NULL, imported_at TEXT NOT NULL,\n    cwd TEXT NOT NULL, branch TEXT NOT NULL,\n    raw_source_path TEXT NOT NULL, raw_upload_permission TEXT NOT NULL,\n    global_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL, global_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,\n    repo_raw_path TEXT NOT NULL, repo_clean_path TEXT NOT NULL,\n    repo_manifest_path TEXT NOT NULL,\n    message_count INTEGER NOT NULL, tool_event_count INTEGER NOT NULL,\n    content TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n    commit_layer TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',\n    PRIMARY KEY (client, project, session_id, raw_sha256)\n  )\n`\n\nconst UPSERT_SQL = `\n  INSERT INTO transcripts (${ALL_COLUMNS.join(', ')})\n  VALUES (${ALL_COLUMNS.map(() => '?').join(', ')})\n  ON CONFLICT(${PK_COLUMNS.join(', ')}) DO UPDATE SET\n    ${DATA_COLUMNS.map((c) => `${c} = excluded.${c}`).join(',\\n    ')}\n`\n\nconst CREATE_FTS_SQL = `\n  CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS transcripts_fts USING fts4(\n    content='transcripts',\n    title, cwd, branch, content, commit_layer\n  )\n`\n\nconst REBUILD_FTS_SQL = `INSERT INTO transcripts_fts(transcripts_fts) VALUES('rebuild')`\n\nconst SEARCH_SQL = `\n  SELECT t.client, t.project, t.session_id, t.title, t.cwd, t.branch, t.started_at\n  FROM transcripts_fts\n  JOIN transcripts t ON transcripts_fts.docid = t.rowid\n  WHERE transcripts_fts MATCH ?\n  ORDER BY t.started_at DESC\n  LIMIT ?\n`\n\nexport interface SearchResult { client: string; project: string; session_id: string; title: string; cwd: string; branch: string; started_at: string }\n\nexport function sanitizeFtsQuery(raw: string): string {\n  return raw.replace(/[^\\p{L}\\p{N}\\s]/gu, ' ').trim().replace(/\\s+/g, ' ')\n}\n\nfunction openDb(dbPath: string): InstanceType<typeof Database> {\n  mkdirSync(dirname(dbPath), { recursive: true })\n  const db = new Database(dbPath)\n  db.pragma('journal_mode = WAL')\n  db.pragma('busy_timeout = 5000')\n  return db\n}\n\nfunction migrateSchema(db: InstanceType<typeof Database>): void {\n  for (const col of ['content', 'commit_layer']) {\n    try {\n      db.exec(`ALTER TABLE transcripts ADD COLUMN ${col} TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`)\n    } catch (e: unknown) {\n      if (!(e instanceof Error) || !e.message.includes('duplicate column name')) throw e\n    }\n  }\n}\n\nfunction migrateFts(db: InstanceType<typeof Database>): void {\n  const row = db.prepare(\n    \"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='transcripts_fts'\"\n  ).get() as { sql: string } | undefined\n  if (!row || !row.sql.includes('commit_layer')) {\n    db.exec('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS transcripts_fts')\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  }\n}\n\nexport function initSchema(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n  } finally { db.close() }\n}\n\nexport function rebuildFtsIndex(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally { db.close() }\n}\n\nexport function searchTranscripts(dbPath: string, query: string, limit = 20): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(sanitized, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch { return [] } finally { db.close() }\n}\n\nexport function searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath: string, query: string, columns: string[], limit = 20): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized || columns.length === 0) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n  const columnQuery = columns.map((col) => `${col}:${sanitized}`).join(' OR ')\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(columnQuery, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch { return [] } finally { db.close() }\n}\n\nexport function upsertSearchIndex(dbPath: string, manifest: ManifestEntry): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n    const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }\n    const params: (string | number)[] = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {\n      const value = record[col]\n      if (value === undefined || value === null) return ''\n      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)\n    })\n    db.prepare(UPSERT_SQL).run(params)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally { db.close() }\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/import.ts (relevant section only)\n```ts\n  try {\n    const contentText = readFileSync(globalCleanPath, 'utf-8')\n    upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, { ...manifest, content: contentText, commit_layer: '' })\n  } catch {\n    // Non-fatal: search index failure should not abort the import\n  }\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/recall/recall.ts (searchRecall section)\n```ts\nimport { searchTranscripts, searchTranscriptsByColumns } from '../transcript/db.js'\nimport type { SearchResult } from '../transcript/db.js'\n\nexport interface SearchRecallResult {\n  layer: 1 | 2 | 3\n  results: SearchResult[]\n}\n\nexport function searchRecall(globalRoot: string, query: string, limit = 20): SearchRecallResult {\n  const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')\n  const layer1 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['commit_layer'], limit)\n  if (layer1.length > 0) return { layer: 1, results: layer1 }\n  const layer2 = searchTranscripts(dbPath, query, limit)\n  if (layer2.length > 0) return { layer: 2, results: layer2 }\n  const layer3 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['content'], limit)\n  return { layer: 3, results: layer3 }\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/search/search-adapter.ts\n```ts\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '@openmnemo/types'\nimport type { SearchResult } from '../../transcript/db.js'\n\nexport interface SearchOptions { limit?: number }\n\nexport interface SearchAdapter {\n  search(query: string, options?: SearchOptions): SearchResult[]\n  upsert(manifest: ManifestEntry): void\n  close(): void\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/search/sqlite-fts-adapter.ts\n```ts\nimport type { ManifestEntry } from '@openmnemo/types'\nimport type { SearchResult } from '../../transcript/db.js'\nimport { upsertSearchIndex, searchTranscripts } from '../../transcript/db.js'\nimport type { SearchAdapter, SearchOptions } from './search-adapter.js'\n\nexport class SqliteFtsAdapter implements SearchAdapter {\n  constructor(private readonly dbPath: string) {}\n  search(query: string, options: SearchOptions = {}): SearchResult[] {\n    return searchTranscripts(this.dbPath, query, options.limit ?? 20)\n  }\n  upsert(manifest: ManifestEntry): void {\n    upsertSearchIndex(this.dbPath, manifest)\n  }\n  close(): void {}\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/factory.ts\n```ts\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { SqliteFtsAdapter } from './search/sqlite-fts-adapter.js'\nimport { QdrantVectorAdapter } from './vector/qdrant-adapter.js'\nimport { Neo4jGraphAdapter } from './graph/neo4j-adapter.js'\nimport type { SearchAdapter } from './search/search-adapter.js'\nimport type { VectorAdapter } from './vector/vector-adapter.js'\nimport type { GraphAdapter } from './graph/graph-adapter.js'\n\nexport interface StorageConfig {\n  indexDir: string\n  vector_backend?: 'sqlite-vec' | 'qdrant'\n  graph_backend?: 'sqlite' | 'neo4j'\n  qdrant_url?: string\n  qdrant_collection?: string\n  neo4j_uri?: string\n  neo4j_user?: string\n  neo4j_password?: string\n}\n\nexport function createSearchAdapter(cfg: StorageConfig): SearchAdapter {\n  return new SqliteFtsAdapter(join(cfg.indexDir, 'search.sqlite'))\n}\n\nexport function createVectorAdapter(cfg: StorageConfig): VectorAdapter {\n  if (cfg.vector_backend === 'qdrant') {\n    return new QdrantVectorAdapter(\n      cfg.qdrant_url ?? 'http://localhost:6333',\n      cfg.qdrant_collection ?? 'transcripts',\n    )\n  }\n  throw new Error('sqlite-vec VectorAdapter not implemented in Phase 1')\n}\n\nexport function createGraphAdapter(cfg: StorageConfig): GraphAdapter {\n  if (cfg.graph_backend === 'neo4j') {\n    return new Neo4jGraphAdapter(\n      cfg.neo4j_uri ?? 'bolt://localhost:7687',\n      cfg.neo4j_user ?? 'neo4j',\n      cfg.neo4j_password ?? '',\n    )\n  }\n  throw new Error('sqlite GraphAdapter not implemented in Phase 1')\n}\n```\n\n### packages/sync/src/config.ts (new fields only)\n```ts\n// In Config interface:\nreadonly vector_backend: 'sqlite-vec' | 'qdrant'\nreadonly graph_backend: 'sqlite' | 'neo4j'\nreadonly embedding_model: string\nreadonly embedding_dims: number\n\n// In defaultConfig():\nvector_backend: 'sqlite-vec',\ngraph_backend: 'sqlite',\nembedding_model: '',\nembedding_dims: 1536,\n\n// In parseRaw():\nvector_backend: raw['vector_backend'] === 'qdrant' ? 'qdrant' : 'sqlite-vec',\ngraph_backend: raw['graph_backend'] === 'neo4j' ? 'neo4j' : 'sqlite',\nembedding_model: typeof raw['embedding_model'] === 'string' ? raw['embedding_model'] : '',\nembedding_dims: typeof raw['embedding_dims'] === 'number' && raw['embedding_dims'] > 0\n  ? raw['embedding_dims']\n  : 1536,\n```\n\n## Review focus\n1. Correctness bugs (logic errors, wrong SQL, type mismatches)\n2. Edge cases not handled\n3. Security issues\n4. Performance concerns\n5. Missing test coverage for important paths\n\nBe specific: file name + line/section + issue + severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW).\nSkip style/formatting issues.",
  "subagent_type": "Explore"
}

{
  "description": "Second review round 1.1 and 1.3",
  "prompt": "You are a senior code reviewer doing a second independent review pass. Focus on different angles than a typical first review.\n\n## Files to review\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts — key functions\n\n```ts\n// migrateSchema: adds content + commit_layer columns to existing DB\nfunction migrateSchema(db): void {\n  for (const col of ['content', 'commit_layer']) {\n    try {\n      db.exec(`ALTER TABLE transcripts ADD COLUMN ${col} TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT ''`)\n    } catch (e) {\n      if (!(e instanceof Error) || !e.message.includes('duplicate column name')) throw e\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n// migrateFts: drops+recreates FTS table if commit_layer column missing\nfunction migrateFts(db): void {\n  const row = db.prepare(\n    \"SELECT sql FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table' AND name='transcripts_fts'\"\n  ).get() as { sql: string } | undefined\n  if (!row || !row.sql.includes('commit_layer')) {\n    db.exec('DROP TABLE IF EXISTS transcripts_fts')\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  }\n}\n\n// searchTranscriptsByColumns: column-scoped FTS4 MATCH\nexport function searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, columns, limit = 20): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized || columns.length === 0) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n  const columnQuery = columns.map((col) => `${col}:${sanitized}`).join(' OR ')\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(columnQuery, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch { return [] } finally { db.close() }\n}\n\n// upsertSearchIndex: write path\nexport function upsertSearchIndex(dbPath, manifest): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n    const params = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {\n      const value = record[col]\n      if (value === undefined || value === null) return ''\n      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)\n    })\n    db.prepare(UPSERT_SQL).run(params)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally { db.close() }\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/recall/recall.ts — searchRecall\n\n```ts\nexport function searchRecall(globalRoot, query, limit = 20): SearchRecallResult {\n  const dbPath = join(globalRoot, 'index', 'search.sqlite')\n  const layer1 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['commit_layer'], limit)\n  if (layer1.length > 0) return { layer: 1, results: layer1 }\n  const layer2 = searchTranscripts(dbPath, query, limit)\n  if (layer2.length > 0) return { layer: 2, results: layer2 }\n  const layer3 = searchTranscriptsByColumns(dbPath, query, ['content'], limit)\n  return { layer: 3, results: layer3 }\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/factory.ts\n\n```ts\nexport function createVectorAdapter(cfg: StorageConfig): VectorAdapter {\n  if (cfg.vector_backend === 'qdrant') {\n    return new QdrantVectorAdapter(...)  // throws \"not implemented in Phase 1\"\n  }\n  throw new Error('sqlite-vec VectorAdapter not implemented in Phase 1')\n}\n\nexport function createGraphAdapter(cfg: StorageConfig): GraphAdapter {\n  if (cfg.graph_backend === 'neo4j') {\n    return new Neo4jGraphAdapter(...)  // throws \"not implemented in Phase 1\"\n  }\n  throw new Error('sqlite GraphAdapter not implemented in Phase 1')\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/search/sqlite-fts-adapter.ts\n\n```ts\nexport class SqliteFtsAdapter implements SearchAdapter {\n  constructor(private readonly dbPath: string) {}\n  search(query, options = {}): SearchResult[] {\n    return searchTranscripts(this.dbPath, query, options.limit ?? 20)\n  }\n  upsert(manifest): void { upsertSearchIndex(this.dbPath, manifest) }\n  close(): void {}\n}\n```\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/import.ts (upsert section)\n\n```ts\ntry {\n  const contentText = readFileSync(globalCleanPath, 'utf-8')\n  upsertSearchIndex(globalDbPath, { ...manifest, content: contentText, commit_layer: '' })\n} catch {\n  // Non-fatal\n}\n```\n\n## Review focus — second pass angles\n1. Concurrency / race conditions (multiple processes writing same DB)\n2. Migration correctness under failure scenarios (partial migration, crash mid-migration)\n3. FTS4 column filter syntax correctness — does `col:term OR col2:term` actually work in SQLite FTS4?\n4. content field size — clean markdown can be large (100KB+). Any SQLite limits? Performance impact on FTS rebuild?\n5. searchRecall layer logic — are there cases where layer2 and layer3 return overlapping results? Is that a problem?\n6. Factory design — is it correct that createVectorAdapter always throws for Phase 1? Will this break any existing callers?\n7. Test gaps — what important scenarios are NOT tested?\n\nBe specific: file + section + issue + severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW).\nSkip style issues.",

}

Show output payload 
[
  {
    "text": "I'll review these files systematically for correctness, edge cases, and potential bugs.\n\n## Review Findings\n\n### packages/types/src/index.ts\n**No issues found.** Type definitions are clean and well-structured. The `ManifestEntry` interface properly includes optional fields (`content?`, `commit_layer?`) matching the db.ts schema defaults.\n\n---\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts\n\n**1. CRITICAL: Silent error swallowing in searchTranscripts and searchTranscriptsByColumns**\n- Lines: `catch { return [] }` in both functions\n- Issue: Catches all exceptions including database corruption, permission errors, and query syntax errors. Caller has no way to distinguish \"no results\" from \"database error\". This masks bugs in FTS query construction.\n- Impact: Bugs in `searchTranscriptsByColumns` column query formatting (line 77) could silently fail without detection.\n- Fix: Log errors or throw; at minimum, distinguish error cases from empty results.\n\n**2. HIGH: Unsafe FTS query construction in searchTranscriptsByColumns**\n- Line 77: `const columnQuery = columns.map((col) => \\`${col}:${sanitized}\\`).join(' OR ')`\n- Issue: Column names are not validated. If `columns` array contains user input or untrusted values, this could inject FTS operators or malformed syntax. The `sanitized` query is safe, but column names bypass validation.\n- Impact: Potential FTS query injection if columns come from user input.\n- Fix: Validate/whitelist column names against known safe set: `['title', 'cwd', 'branch', 'content', 'commit_layer']`\n\n**3. HIGH: Race condition in migrateFts**\n- Lines 60-66: Checks if FTS table exists, then drops and recreates it\n- Issue: Between the check and the drop, another process could modify the table. Also, `REBUILD_FTS_SQL` is called after every upsert (line 95), which is expensive and unnecessary—FTS4 with `content=` option auto-syncs.\n- Impact: Unnecessary performance degradation; potential data loss if concurrent access occurs.\n- Fix: Use `IF NOT EXISTS` in CREATE, remove `REBUILD_FTS_SQL` from upsertSearchIndex, or use FTS5 with auto-rebuild.\n\n**4. MEDIUM: Missing global_manifest_path in ALL_COLUMNS**\n- Line 10: `ManifestEntry` includes `global_manifest_path`, but it's not in `DATA_COLUMNS` or `ALL_COLUMNS`\n- Issue: This field is silently dropped during upsert. If it's needed later, data loss occurs.\n- Impact: Incomplete manifest persistence.\n- Fix: Add `'global_manifest_path'` to `DATA_COLUMNS` and update CREATE_TABLE_SQL.\n\n**5. MEDIUM: Inconsistent null handling in upsertSearchIndex**\n- Lines 88-92: Converts `undefined` and `null` to empty string `''`\n- Issue: This loses information—can't distinguish \"field was null\" from \"field was empty string\". For optional fields like `content` and `commit_layer`, this may be intentional, but for required fields like `title`, it masks data quality issues.\n- Impact: Silent data corruption if required fields are missing.\n- Fix: Validate that required fields are present before upsert; throw error if missing.\n\n**6. MEDIUM: FTS4 content table sync issue**\n- Line 95: `db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)` after every upsert\n- Issue: FTS4 with `content=` option requires manual rebuild only if the content table is modified outside FTS. Since we're using prepared statements, this is unnecessary overhead.\n- Impact: Performance: every upsert triggers a full FTS rebuild.\n- Fix: Remove the rebuild call; FTS4 auto-syncs with content table.\n\n**7. LOW: Missing index on search results**\n- Line 50: SEARCH_SQL joins on `rowid` but no explicit index\n- Issue: FTS4 provides implicit rowid mapping, but performance could degrade with large tables.\n- Impact: Slow searches on large datasets.\n- Fix: Consider adding explicit index or migrating to FTS5.\n\n---\n\n### packages/core/src/transcript/import.ts\n\n**1. MEDIUM: Empty commit_layer silently set**\n- Line: `commit_layer: ''`\n- Issue: The field is always initialized to empty string, but `searchRecall` (recall.ts line 8) searches for non-empty `commit_layer` in layer 1. This means layer 1 will never return results unless `commit_layer` is explicitly populated elsewhere.\n- Impact: Layer 1 search is dead code.\n- Fix: Either populate `commit_layer` during import or remove layer 1 from searchRecall.\n\n---\n\n### packages/core/src/recall/recall.ts\n\n**1. HIGH: Unreachable layer 1 search**\n- Lines 8-9: Searches `commit_layer` column, but import.ts always sets it to `''`\n- Issue: Layer 1 will always return empty results.\n- Impact: Search logic is broken; layer 1 is dead code.\n- Fix: Either populate `commit_layer` during import or remove layer 1 logic.\n\n**2. MEDIUM: No limit enforcement across layers**\n- Lines 8-13: Each layer search respects `limit`, but if layer 1 returns 1 result and layer 2 returns 19, the caller gets 20 total—not the requested limit.\n- Issue: Ambiguous semantics: does `limit` apply per-layer or total?\n- Impact: Inconsistent result counts.\n- Fix: Document behavior or enforce total limit across all layers.\n\n---\n\n### packages/core/src/storage/search/sqlite-fts-adapter.ts\n\n**1. MEDIUM: Error handling gap**\n- Line 8: `searchTranscripts` can silently return `[]` on error (db.ts line 73)\n- Issue: Adapter doesn't distinguish \"no results\" from \"database error\". Caller can't retry or handle errors.\n- Impact: Silent failures propagate up the stack.\n- Fix: Propagate errors from db.ts instead of swallowing them.\n\n---\n\n### packages/sync/src/config.ts\n\n**1. MEDIUM: Missing validation for embedding_dims**\n- Line: `embedding_dims: 1536`\n- Issue: No validation that `embedding_dims` matches the actual embedding model. If user sets `embedding_model: 'text-embedding-3-small'` (1536 dims) but `embedding_dims: 3072`, vector operations will fail.\n- Impact: Runtime errors during vector operations.\n- Fix: Add validation that dims match model, or auto-detect from model name.\n\n**2. LOW: Empty embedding_model default**\n- Line: `embedding_model: ''`\n- Issue: Empty string is falsy but not `null`. Code checking `if (cfg.embedding_model)` will fail silently.\n- Impact: Vector operations will fail if embedding_model is not explicitly set.\n- Fix: Use `null` or throw error if embedding_model is required.\n\n---\n\n## Summary\n\n**CRITICAL (1):** Silent error swallowing in search functions masks bugs.\n\n**HIGH (3):** \n- FTS query injection via unvalidated column names\n- Race condition in FTS migration\n- Unreachable layer 1 search (dead code)\n\n**MEDIUM (6):** Missing `global_manifest_path` in schema, null handling inconsistency, unnecessary FTS rebuilds, layer 1 always empty, error handling gaps, embedding_dims validation missing.\n\n**Recommendation:** Fix CRITICAL and HIGH issues before next release. The layer 1 search being dead code suggests incomplete implementation—clarify whether `commit_layer` should be populated during import.",

  },

Agent output=[{"text":"Based on my thorough second-pass review, here are the critical findings:\n\n## SECOND-PASS CODE REVIEW REPORT\n\n### 1. **FTS4 Column Filter Syntax — CRITICAL**\n**Fil...
Show output payload 
[
  {
    "text": "Based on my thorough second-pass review, here are the critical findings:\n\n## SECOND-PASS CODE REVIEW REPORT\n\n### 1. **FTS4 Column Filter Syntax — CRITICAL**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts` (line 253)  \n**Issue:** The column filter syntax `col:term OR col2:term` is **not valid FTS4 syntax**.\n\nFTS4 column filters use the format `column:term` but the `OR` operator at the FTS level doesn't work as intended. The correct syntax should be `(commit_layer:${sanitized})` as a single MATCH clause, not `commit_layer:term OR content:term`.\n\n**Impact:** `searchTranscriptsByColumns(['commit_layer', 'content'], query)` will likely fail silently or return incorrect results because the MATCH clause becomes malformed.\n\n**Severity:** CRITICAL — Search layer 1 and 3 in `searchRecall` may not work correctly.\n\n---\n\n### 2. **Race Condition in Migration — HIGH**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts` (lines 156-164, 170-180)  \n**Issue:** `migrateSchema` and `migrateFts` are called inside `upsertSearchIndex` without transaction protection. Multiple concurrent writers can:\n- Both attempt `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN` simultaneously\n- One process drops FTS table while another is querying it\n- Partial migration state leaves DB inconsistent\n\n**Current mitigation:** `busy_timeout = 5000ms` only delays, doesn't prevent race conditions.\n\n**Severity:** HIGH — Under concurrent load (multiple sync processes), DB corruption or query failures are possible.\n\n---\n\n### 3. **Content Field Size — Performance Risk — HIGH**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/transcript/import.ts` (line 106-107)  \n**Issue:** Clean markdown files can be 100KB+ (full session transcripts). Storing entire content in SQLite TEXT column and rebuilding FTS index on every upsert is expensive:\n- FTS rebuild is O(n) for all rows\n- Large TEXT fields slow down FTS queries\n- No pagination or chunking strategy\n\n**Current behavior:** Every `upsertSearchIndex` call triggers `REBUILD_FTS_SQL` (line 287 in db.ts), even for single-row inserts.\n\n**Severity:** HIGH — Performance degrades with large transcripts; FTS rebuild becomes bottleneck.\n\n---\n\n### 4. **searchRecall Layer Logic — Overlapping Results — MEDIUM**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/recall/recall.ts` (lines 293-308)  \n**Issue:** Layers 1, 2, and 3 can return overlapping results:\n- Layer 1 searches `commit_layer` column\n- Layer 2 searches `title, cwd, branch` (default FTS)\n- Layer 3 searches `content` column\n\nIf a term appears in both `commit_layer` and `title`, layer 1 returns it and layer 2 is skipped. This is intentional (first match wins), but there's **no test coverage** for this behavior. Edge case: what if layer 1 returns partial results (< limit) but layer 2 would have better matches?\n\n**Severity:** MEDIUM — Design is defensible but untested; could surprise users.\n\n---\n\n### 5. **Factory Design — Incomplete Phase 1 — MEDIUM**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/storage/factory.ts` (lines 24-43)  \n**Issue:** Both `createVectorAdapter` and `createGraphAdapter` always throw \"not implemented in Phase 1\". However:\n- Tests expect this (lines 108-129 in adapters.test.ts)\n- No callers currently invoke these factories (grep found 0 usages outside tests)\n- But if code is added that calls these factories without try-catch, it will crash\n\n**Severity:** MEDIUM — Design is correct for Phase 1, but fragile. Should document that these are stubs.\n\n---\n\n### 6. **Migration Idempotency Under Failure — HIGH**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts` (lines 156-164)  \n**Issue:** If `migrateSchema` partially succeeds (e.g., adds `content` but crashes before `commit_layer`), the next call will:\n- Skip `content` (already exists, caught by try-catch)\n- Attempt `commit_layer` again\n- But `migrateFts` checks for `commit_layer` in FTS table, not in transcripts table\n\n**Scenario:** Crash after `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN content` but before `ALTER TABLE ADD COLUMN commit_layer`. Next restart: `migrateFts` sees old FTS table (no `commit_layer`), drops it, recreates it. But transcripts table is missing `commit_layer` column → INSERT fails.\n\n**Severity:** HIGH — Partial migration can leave DB in broken state.\n\n---\n\n### 7. **Test Gaps — MEDIUM**\n**Missing test coverage:**\n- No tests for `searchTranscriptsByColumns` with actual FTS queries (only db.test.ts line 7 imports it, but no dedicated test suite)\n- No concurrent write tests (multiple processes upsert simultaneously)\n- No `searchRecall` layer fallback tests (what if layer 1 returns 0 results?)\n- No large content field tests (100KB+ markdown in FTS)\n- No migration failure recovery tests (crash mid-migration)\n\n**Severity:** MEDIUM — Critical paths untested.\n\n---\n\n### 8. **Error Handling in searchTranscriptsByColumns — LOW**\n**File:** `packages/core/src/transcript/db.ts` (lines 243-262)  \n**Issue:** Catch-all `catch { return [] }` silently swallows all errors, including:\n- Malformed FTS query syntax (the column filter bug above)\n- Database corruption\n- Permission errors\n\nUsers get empty results with no indication of failure.\n\n**Severity:** LOW — Defensive, but makes debugging hard.\n\n---\n\n## Summary Table\n\n| Issue | File | Line(s) | Severity | Category |\n|-------|------|---------|----------|----------|\n| FTS4 column filter syntax invalid | db.ts | 253 | CRITICAL | Correctness |\n| Race condition in migration | db.ts | 156-180 | HIGH | Concurrency |\n| Content field size / FTS rebuild perf | import.ts, db.ts | 106-107, 287 | HIGH | Performance |\n| searchRecall layer overlap untested | recall.ts | 293-308 | MEDIUM | Testing |\n| Factory stubs fragile | factory.ts | 24-43 | MEDIUM | Design |\n| Partial migration recovery broken | db.ts | 156-164, 170-180 | HIGH | Reliability |\n| Test gaps (concurrency, layers, large content) | tests/ | — | MEDIUM | Testing |\n| Silent error swallowing | db.ts | 257 | LOW | Observability |",
    "type": "text"
  },
  {
    "type": "text",

  }
]
assistant #612 14:19:46

两轮 review 结果汇总，去重后按优先级排列：

---

CRITICAL

1. FTS4 列过滤语法可能有问题 — col:term OR col2:term 在 FTS4 中的行为需要验证。两个 reviewer 都提到，但结论不一致（一个说 CRITICAL，一个说 HIGH）。实际上 SQLite FTS4 支持 column:term 语法，OR 也是合法的 FTS 操作符，但需要实测确认。

HIGH

2. global_manifest_path 未写入 DB — ManifestEntry 有这个字段，但 DATA_COLUMNS 里没有，upsert 时静默丢弃。
3. 列名未白名单校验 — searchTranscriptsByColumns 的 columns 参数直接拼入 MATCH 子句，若来自外部输入有注入风险。
4. Layer 1 永远返回空 — import.ts 始终写 commit_layer: ''，searchRecall 的 Layer 1 是死代码（这是已知的，task 1.2 会填充，但应加注释说明）。
5. 并发迁移竞态 — migrateSchema + migrateFts 无事务保护，多进程并发写时可能冲突。

MEDIUM

6. 每次 upsert 都全量 rebuild FTS — 性能问题，大 content 字段时尤为明显（已知，之前 review 也提过）。
7. searchRecall limit 语义不清 — limit 是 per-layer 还是 total 未文档化。
8. embedding_dims 无模型匹配校验 — config 里 dims 和 model 可以不一致。

---

需要立即修复的（HIGH 以上）：

- #2 global_manifest_path 缺失 — 数据丢失，必须修
- #3 列名白名单 — 安全问题
- #4 Layer 1 死代码加注释 — 避免误解
- #5 并发迁移加事务

可以推迟的：

- #1 FTS4 语法需要实测验证（先写个测试）
- #6 FTS rebuild 性能（已知，后续优化）
- #7 #8 文档/配置问题

---

要现在修复 HIGH 以上的问题吗？还是先验证 FTS4 列过滤语法是否真的有问题？

Bash input={"command":"cd D:/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3'\nimport { mkdtempSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimpor...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "cd D:/demo1/openmnemo/packages/core && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'\nimport Database from 'better-sqlite3'\nimport { mkdtempSync, rmSync } from 'node:fs'\nimport { join } from 'node:path'\nimport { tmpdir } from 'node:os'\n\nconst tmpDir = mkdtempSync(join(tmpdir(), 'fts4-test-'))\nconst db = new Database(join(tmpDir, 'test.sqlite'))\n\ndb.exec(`\n  CREATE TABLE t (title TEXT, content TEXT, commit_layer TEXT);\n  INSERT INTO t VALUES ('auth bug fix', 'long markdown body about auth', '');\n  INSERT INTO t VALUES ('unrelated', 'nothing here', 'fix: auth middleware');\n  CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE t_fts USING fts4(content='t', title, content, commit_layer);\n  INSERT INTO t_fts(t_fts) VALUES('rebuild');\n`)\n\n// Test 1: single column filter\nconst r1 = db.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM t_fts WHERE t_fts MATCH 'title:auth'\").all()\nconsole.log('title:auth =>', r1.length, 'rows (expect 1)')\n\n// Test 2: OR across columns\nconst r2 = db.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM t_fts WHERE t_fts MATCH 'commit_layer:auth OR title:auth'\").all()\nconsole.log('commit_layer:auth OR title:auth =>', r2.length, 'rows (expect 2)')\n\n// Test 3: content column filter\nconst r3 = db.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM t_fts WHERE t_fts MATCH 'content:auth'\").all()\nconsole.log('content:auth =>', r3.length, 'rows (expect 1)')\n\n// Test 4: commit_layer only\nconst r4 = db.prepare(\"SELECT * FROM t_fts WHERE t_fts MATCH 'commit_layer:auth'\").all()\nconsole.log('commit_layer:auth =>', r4.length, 'rows (expect 1)')\n\ndb.close()\nrmSync(tmpDir, { recursive: true, force: true })\nEOF\n",
  "description": "Test FTS4 column filter syntax with OR"
}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\transcript\\db.ts",
  "old_string": "/**\n * Search restricted to specific FTS columns using FTS4 column filter syntax.\n * e.g. columns=['commit_layer'] → MATCH 'commit_layer:term'\n */\nexport function searchTranscriptsByColumns(\n  dbPath: string,\n  query: string,\n  columns: string[],\n  limit = 20,\n): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized || columns.length === 0) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n\n  const columnQuery = columns.map((col) => `${col}:${sanitized}`).join(' OR ')\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(columnQuery, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}",
  "new_string": "const FTS_COLUMNS = new Set(['title', 'cwd', 'branch', 'content', 'commit_layer'])\n\n/**\n * Search restricted to specific FTS columns using FTS4 column filter syntax.\n * e.g. columns=['commit_layer'] → MATCH 'commit_layer:term'\n * Column names are validated against the known FTS column set.\n */\nexport function searchTranscriptsByColumns(\n  dbPath: string,\n  query: string,\n  columns: string[],\n  limit = 20,\n): SearchResult[] {\n  const sanitized = sanitizeFtsQuery(query)\n  if (!sanitized) return []\n  const validColumns = columns.filter((c) => FTS_COLUMNS.has(c))\n  if (validColumns.length === 0) return []\n  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) return []\n\n  const columnQuery = validColumns.map((col) => `${col}:${sanitized}`).join(' OR ')\n  const db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true })\n  try {\n    return db.prepare(SEARCH_SQL).all(columnQuery, limit) as SearchResult[]\n  } catch {\n    return []\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}"
}

This is intentional — the layer structure is in place for\n * when commit data becomes available.\n */"

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\transcript\\db.ts",
  "old_string": "export function initSchema(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}",
  "new_string": "export function initSchema(dbPath: string): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.transaction(() => {\n      db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n      migrateSchema(db)\n      db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n      migrateFts(db)\n    })()\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}"
}

{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\transcript\\db.ts",
  "old_string": "export function upsertSearchIndex(\n  dbPath: string,\n  manifest: ManifestEntry,\n): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n    migrateSchema(db)\n    db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n    migrateFts(db)\n\n    const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }\n    const params: (string | number)[] = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {\n      const value = record[col]\n      if (value === undefined || value === null) return ''\n      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)\n    })\n\n    db.prepare(UPSERT_SQL).run(params)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}",
  "new_string": "export function upsertSearchIndex(\n  dbPath: string,\n  manifest: ManifestEntry,\n): void {\n  const db = openDb(dbPath)\n  try {\n    db.transaction(() => {\n      db.exec(CREATE_TABLE_SQL)\n      migrateSchema(db)\n      db.exec(CREATE_FTS_SQL)\n      migrateFts(db)\n    })()\n\n    const record: Record<string, unknown> = { ...manifest }\n    const params: (string | number)[] = ALL_COLUMNS.map((col) => {\n      const value = record[col]\n      if (value === undefined || value === null) return ''\n      return typeof value === 'number' ? value : String(value)\n    })\n\n    db.prepare(UPSERT_SQL).run(params)\n    db.exec(REBUILD_FTS_SQL)\n  } finally {\n    db.close()\n  }\n}"
}

推送完成（f517214）。

---

现在罗列接下来还需要做的事情：

已完成
- 1.0 better-sqlite3 迁移
- 1.1 FTS content/commit_layer + 分层检索
- 1.3 存储适配器接口 + factory

待做清单

1.2 — commit_layer 填充
- import 时读取 git log，写入 commit message + changed files 到 commit_layer 字段
- 让 searchRecall Layer 1 真正生效

1.4 — 向量适配器实现（sqlite-vec）
- 实现 SqliteVecAdapter 替换 Phase 1 stub
- 需要安装 sqlite-vec 扩展

1.5 — 图谱适配器实现（sqlite）
- 用 SQLite + 递归 CTE 实现 GraphAdapter
- 替换 Neo4jGraphAdapter stub

2.0 — AI 摘要集成
- 调用 Claude API 生成 session 摘要
- 写入 manifest 或单独字段

3.0 — Report 增强
- 基于向量/图谱数据生成更丰富的报告

MEDIUM 遗留问题（可随时处理）
- FTS rebuild 性能优化（批量 upsert 后统一 rebuild）
- searchRecall limit 语义文档化
- embedding_dims 模型匹配校验

---

优先级建议：1.2 → 1.4 → 1.5，因为 1.2 让现有的分层检索真正可用，1.4/1.5 是后续 AI 功能的基础。

你想先做哪个？

user #651 14:30:34

从1.2到1.5的改动大吗？我想的是做一个阶段性的事件以后、节点以后，我们整体的review一下我们的前面的修改，看看是否真的可以跑得起来。你觉得在哪一步做这个节点比较好呢？然后我们再整体的review。

assistant #652 14:30:51

好问题。先看一下各任务的改动量：

1.2 — commit_layer 填充
- 改动小：import.ts 里加一个 git log 调用，填充 commit_layer 字段
- 风险低：只影响写入路径，不改接口

1.4 — sqlite-vec 向量适配器
- 改动中：需要安装新依赖 sqlite-vec，实现 SqliteVecAdapter，涉及 native binding
- 风险中：新依赖，平台兼容性未知

1.5 — sqlite 图谱适配器
- 改动中：纯 SQL 实现，递归 CTE，不需要新依赖
- 风险低

---

建议的节点：1.2 完成后做整体 review

理由：
- 1.2 完成后，整个核心数据流就闭环了：发现 → 解析 → 导入 → 写 DB（含 content + commit_layer）→ 分层检索全部生效
- 这是一个自然的"Phase 1 核心功能完整"节点，可以端到端跑一遍真实数据验证
- 1.4/1.5 是新能力扩展，依赖新库，放在验证核心流程之后更稳

整体 review 的内容建议：
1. 端到端跑一次真实 import → search 流程
2. 检查 DB schema 是否和 ManifestEntry 完全对齐
3. 检查所有 public API 的导出是否一致
4. 跑全量测试 + 检查覆盖率

Show output payload 
1→/**
     2→ * Subprocess execution wrapper for git and other commands.
     3→ * Port of heartbeat.py _git() and daemon subprocess calls.
     4→ */
     5→
     6→import { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'
     7→
     8→export function execCommand(
     9→  command: string,
    10→  args: readonly string[],
    11→  options?: { cwd?: string; timeout?: number; allowFailure?: boolean },
    12→): string {
    13→  const cwd = options?.cwd
    14→  const timeout = options?.timeout ?? 120_000
    15→  const allowFailure = options?.allowFailure ?? false
    16→
    17→  try {
    18→    const stdout = execFileSync(command, [...args], {
    19→      cwd,
    20→      timeout,
    21→      encoding: 'utf-8',
    22→      stdio: ['pipe', 'pipe', 'pipe'],
    23→    })
    24→    return stdout
    25→  } catch (err: unknown) {
    26→    if (allowFailure) {
    27→      const e = err as { stdout?: string }
    28→      return typeof e.stdout === 'string' ? e.stdout : ''
    29→    }
    30→    throw err
    31→  }
    32→}
    33→
    34→export function git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {
    35→  const allowFailure = args[0] === 'status' || args[0] === 'remote'
    36→  return execCommand('git', args, { cwd, allowFailure })
    37→}
    38→

先在 exec.ts 里加一个专门获取 commit_layer 数据的函数，然后更新 import.ts：

Tool Call #663 Edit tooluse_bouVkGdJpZEG78JfY5TuIY 14:32:14
Edit input={"file_path":"D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\utils\\exec.ts","new_string":"export function git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {\n const allowFailure = args[...
Show input payload 
{
  "replace_all": false,
  "file_path": "D:\\demo1\\openmnemo\\packages\\core\\src\\utils\\exec.ts",
  "old_string": "export function git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {\n  const allowFailure = args[0] === 'status' || args[0] === 'remote'\n  return execCommand('git', args, { cwd, allowFailure })\n}",
  "new_string": "export function git(cwd: string, ...args: string[]): string {\n  const allowFailure = args[0] === 'status' || args[0] === 'remote'\n  return execCommand('git', args, { cwd, allowFailure })\n}\n\n/**\n * Build a commit_layer string for FTS indexing.\n * Collects the last N commit messages + changed file paths from the repo at cwd.\n * Returns empty string if cwd is not a git repo or git is unavailable.\n */\nexport function buildCommitLayer(cwd: string, maxCommits = 10): string {\n  try {\n    // Get last N commit messages\n    const log = execCommand('git', ['log', `--max-count=${maxCommits}`, '--pretty=format:%s'], {\n      cwd,\n      allowFailure: true,\n      timeout: 10_000,\n    })\n    // Get changed files from last N commits (deduplicated)\n    const files = execCommand('git', ['log', `--max-count=${maxCommits}`, '--name-only', '--pretty=format:'], {\n      cwd,\n      allowFailure: true,\n      timeout: 10_000,\n    })\n\n    const parts: string[] = []\n    if (log.trim()) parts.push(log.trim())\n    if (files.trim()) {\n      const uniqueFiles = [...new Set(\n        files.split('\\n').map(l => l.trim()).filter(Boolean)\n      )].join('\\n')\n      if (uniqueFiles) parts.push(uniqueFiles)\n    }\n    return parts.join('\\n')\n  } catch {\n    return ''\n  }\n}"
}

Bash input={"command":"cd D:/demo1/openmnemo && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'\nimport { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nfunction buildCommitLayer(cwd, maxCommits = 5) {\n t...
Show input payload 
{
  "command": "cd D:/demo1/openmnemo && node --input-type=module << 'EOF'\nimport { execFileSync } from 'node:child_process'\n\nfunction buildCommitLayer(cwd, maxCommits = 5) {\n  try {\n    const log = execFileSync('git', ['log', `--max-count=${maxCommits}`, '--pretty=format:%s'], { cwd, encoding: 'utf-8', timeout: 10000 })\n    const files = execFileSync('git', ['log', `--max-count=${maxCommits}`, '--name-only', '--pretty=format:'], { cwd, encoding: 'utf-8', timeout: 10000 })\n    const parts = []\n    if (log.trim()) parts.push(log.trim())\n    const uniqueFiles = [...new Set(files.split('\\n').map(l => l.trim()).filter(Boolean))].join('\\n')\n    if (uniqueFiles) parts.push(uniqueFiles)\n    return parts.join('\\n')\n  } catch { return '' }\n}\n\nconst result = buildCommitLayer('D:/demo1/openmnemo', 5)\nconsole.log('--- commit_layer output ---')\nconsole.log(result.slice(0, 600))\nconsole.log('--- length:', result.length, 'chars ---')\nEOF\n",
  "description": "Test buildCommitLayer logic inline"
}
